productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Purple Shirt
description: CompositionPurple shirt made of 67% linen and 33% cotton, has a short spread collar, full length buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, buttoned flaps on the shoulders, buttoned cuffs, yoke at the back with a vertical design in the middle, two patch pockets on the chest with a vertical design and a curved hemWash careMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, bleach, scrub, tumble dry or wringDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsGet back to the basics with this shirt from united colors of benetton for women. A great choice for everyday wear, team it with a denim pencil skirt and heeled sandals for a stylish look.Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
